nativeProps: React.InputHTMLAttributes<HTMLInputElement>, excluding type, value, defaultValue, and native onChange

props.name: submitLabel
props.type: string; renders a native submit button when supplied

compositionPolicy.native: A real search input owns editing, IME composition, validation, Enter submission, form serialization, and reset.
compositionPolicy.clear: The clear button is non-submit, unavailable during composition, updates the same controlled or uncontrolled value contract, and restores input focus.
compositionPolicy.results: resultsId associates the input with consumer-rendered results; explicit localized loading, results, empty, and error messages are programmatically described.
compositionPolicy.field: ID, label, description, error, required, and invalid relationships are inherited from Field unless explicitly supplied.
